quotes: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.

blocks.text: Used to express an unreal past condition and its probable result in the present.
If we had adopted renewable energy earlier, our air would be cleaner today.
If + Past Perfect, Subject + would + verb (infinitive).
How to write a balanced argumentative essay.
Furthermore, Nevertheless, On the other hand, Consequently.

memory_sprint.prompt: Which word means 'no longer in use'?
memory_sprint.explain: Obsolete means out of date or no longer used.

memory_sprint.prompt: Mixed conditionals can combine a past condition with a present result.
memory_sprint.explain: True. E.g., If I had studied harder (past), I would be at university now (present).

memory_sprint.prompt: Is 'furthermore' used to introduce a contrasting idea?
memory_sprint.explain: No, 'furthermore' is used to add more information, not contrast.

memory_sprint.prompt: Complete: If I had known you were coming, I _____ a cake.
memory_sprint.explain: This is a Third Conditional (past condition, past result): would have baked.
False, it refers to the newest and most advanced technology.

gb_adaptive_quiz.q: Type the missing word: Technology has made some jobs completely ________ (outdated).

reading.text: The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) has sparked widespread debate across the globe. While some argue that cutting-edge algorithms will solve humanity's greatest challenges, others fear the consequences. If developers had established stricter ethical guidelines a decade ago, we might not be facing the current privacy concerns today. Nevertheless, it is undeniable that AI represents a major breakthrough in computer science. Many traditional roles are becoming obsolete; consequently, the workforce must adapt to this new paradigm. On the other hand, entirely new industries are emerging.

checkpoints.q: What is the main topic of the text?
ans: The impact and debate surrounding artificial intelligence

real_life.story: You are a technology blogger reviewing a newly released smartphone.

q1.prompt: How do you say 'Bu telefon eng zamonaviy texnologiyalarga ega' in English?

q2.prompt: Fill in: The old model is now ________.

q3.prompt: Translate: Agar ular batareyani yaxshilashganida, men uni sotib olgan bo'lardim.
q3.ans: If they had improved the battery, I would have bought it

q4.prompt: Link these ideas: The camera is great. _____, the battery life is poor.

q5.prompt: Write a short sentence summarizing your review.

boss_questions.q: Complete the mixed conditional: If she had taken the medication yesterday, she _____ (feel) better today.
boss_questions.hint: Past condition (had taken) + present result (would + verb).

boss_questions.q: Which word is a synonym for 'cutting-edge'?
boss_questions.hint: Think of words that mean new and highly developed.

boss_questions.q: What linking word can replace 'as a result'?
Correct the error: If I had money now, I would have bought it yesterday.
ans: If I had had money yesterday, I would buy it now
If I had money yesterday, I would have bought it
boss_questions.hint: Check the sequence of tenses in conditionals.
Something that is NOT out of date.

reflection.summary: We discussed advanced technology vocabulary and the structure of mixed conditionals.
reflection.question: Why is it important to use linking words in an essay?
reflection.spaced_rep: Review the mixed conditional structure tomorrow.
